query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A reddish flower bud rests near the center of pale, curving white surfaces. The surrounding forms fall in broad folds, creating a composition of whites and light grays that frame the concentrated crimson and rose tones of the central bloom.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image exhibits intentional blur and a profound lack of fine detail, rendering a reddish flower bud and its surrounding pale surfaces with smeared, mushy textures that dissolve into ambiguity. The heavy soft-focus or motion-blur effect creates a dreamlike impression where edges and features are obscured, leaving only a ghostly suggestion of a crimson bloom amid flowing white and gray forms.
